Conv1d

Source: R/gen-namespace-docs.R, R/gen-namespace-examples.R, R/gen-namespace.R
torch_conv1d.Rd

Conv1d

Usage

torch_conv1d(
  input,
  weight,
  bias = list(),
  stride = 1L,
  padding = 0L,
  dilation = 1L,
  groups = 1L
)

Arguments

input

input tensor of shape \((\mbox{minibatch} , \mbox{in\_channels} , iW)\)

weight

filters of shape \((\mbox{out\_channels} , \frac{\mbox{in\_channels}}{\mbox{groups}} , kW)\)

bias

optional bias of shape \((\mbox{out\_channels})\). Default: NULL

stride

the stride of the convolving kernel. Can be a single number or a one-element tuple (sW,). Default: 1

padding

implicit paddings on both sides of the input. Can be a single number or a one-element tuple (padW,). Default: 0

dilation

the spacing between kernel elements. Can be a single number or a one-element tuple (dW,). Default: 1

groups

split input into groups, \(\mbox{in\_channels}\) should be divisible by the number of groups. Default: 1

conv1d(input, weight, bias=NULL, stride=1, padding=0, dilation=1, groups=1) -> Tensor

Applies a 1D convolution over an input signal composed of several input planes.

See nn_conv1d() for details and output shape.

Examples

if (torch_is_installed()) {

filters = torch_randn(c(33, 16, 3))
inputs = torch_randn(c(20, 16, 50))
nnf_conv1d(inputs, filters)
}
#> torch_tensor
#> (1,.,.) = 
#>  Columns 1 to 8  -3.2422   2.1145  -6.9107  -0.6399 -10.0862  -5.0437   5.4936  -0.2970
#>   -2.7264   0.2087   3.6062   0.1452  -2.1925  -5.0901 -12.5891   6.6372
#>    2.7636  17.6600  10.6301  -1.0531  -0.6492  -7.8902   3.0261  -1.3555
#>   -0.5525   8.8508  -2.3888   3.8996  -5.0635   2.3025   9.2025  -4.0765
#>    1.5944 -13.8512  -4.4155 -12.2114  -0.8909  -9.1313   4.7267 -12.8710
#>   -5.7143   9.6894 -10.9086  14.0189   2.5869   0.1482  -6.0585   1.2899
#>   -8.3801   3.9757  -7.4486  -4.1958  -8.9038   4.4931   3.8579   4.8457
#>  -12.4988   5.1274  -5.0791   6.2883   7.2810   6.1541   0.7750   8.2427
#>    8.6407  -0.1394   8.6079  -1.3895   1.9358   5.3913   3.1190   1.3350
#>    5.7259  -7.1573   7.9215  -2.4328   8.0874  -7.2857   0.4207  -1.6637
#>    8.3060   2.3272   1.1561   1.8270   3.0263  -3.8954   5.4720   2.7737
#>  -11.6223  -1.0087  -9.1244   5.5491 -13.8297  -4.7502  -5.0904  -0.4096
#>    6.3965  -0.8674   1.1204  -8.4730   0.4765  10.2681   2.0554  -3.6815
#>    2.7094  13.6990 -10.6400  -8.0668  -4.3492  -2.4390   9.1803  -2.2295
#>  -14.5116  -7.9749 -14.3574   0.6638   1.2348   5.3553   2.9147  -4.5310
#>    1.7319   6.2083  -0.5817  -2.4403  -5.3678  -6.7214  -2.2501  -9.4515
#>   -0.4496   8.5742   2.6799  -0.2345  13.3673   8.4234  -4.3860  -2.5128
#>    1.7047   4.3406 -11.1807   4.4465  -0.2413  10.0381   0.6374   3.1671
#>    2.6427   1.1635   7.8482   2.6552  -3.6708   2.2198   7.9074   7.2936
#>    1.6271  -9.9458   1.3561  -3.2965   0.9985  -4.5291  10.8370   2.6482
#>   -5.4602  -9.5363  -4.5623  -0.9946  -5.5645   6.9034  -0.7157   1.7105
#>    4.4721   8.0677  11.5682  -6.7765  -2.1895  -0.0959   8.1695  -9.0209
#>   10.5452  -5.0786  -5.3506   6.2973 -10.2380   5.5918  -1.2975   7.1749
#>   -7.3524   1.8281   3.1151  -1.2424   5.7782  -1.2985  11.4665  -4.1345
